scope: Funnelback resultPacket -> dropdown-bucket response field mapping performed by the three funnelback-proxy-dev suggestion handlers; feeds the ADR-007 suggestions-dispatch build brief.
posture: Reference, not specification. Binding constraints are end-user dropdown functionality and live /s/search.json shapes. Proxy code is authoritative only on how the legacy did it. Every field carries a binding_status.
status: Both /s/search.json legs (people, programs) confirmed against live samples captured 2026-06-22. General leg (/s/suggest.json) remains code-reference (its upstream is a plain string array, well understood).

binding_status_values.confirmed_ftl: Matches the held results.people.ftl stencil vocabulary.
binding_status_values.confirmed_live: Verified against a live /s/search.json sample captured this session.
binding_status_values.confirmed_ftl+live: Matches the held FTL stencil AND verified against the live sample.
binding_status_values.reference_only: From proxy code; not otherwise confirmed.
binding_status_values.needs_live_confirmation: Depends on a live /s/search.json shape not yet captured for that collection.

cleanTitle.behavior: strip HTML tags (/<\/?[^>]+(>|$)/g) -> take first pipe segment (.split('|')[0]) -> .trim()

cleanProgramTitle.behavior: falsy -> ''; else take first pipe segment (.split('|')[0]) -> strip HTML tags (/<[^>]+>/g) -> .trim()

normalization_helpers.divergence_note: The two helpers are independent local definitions, not a shared module. Operation order and regexes differ; outputs differ only when an HTML tag contains a '|'. Captured, not reconciled.

legs.upstream_response: raw JSON array of strings (coerced to [] if not an array, suggest.js:434)
legs.emitted_shape: { display: <string>, metadata: { tabs: string[] } }  (NOT a bare string)

fields.source: NOT from Funnelback - derived from request query params: query['f.Tabs|programMain'] -> 'program-main'; query['f.Tabs|seattleu~ds-staff'] -> 'Faculty & Staff'

legs.shape_decision: Legacy emits { display, metadata:{ tabs } }. tabs is a proxy-internal artifact with no Funnelback source. Recommend the rebuild dispatcher emit { display } and drop tabs unless the dropdown consumes it (confirm vs fe-autocomplete-audit-2026-05-05).

legs.source_root_status: confirmed_live (envelope response.resultPacket.results[] verified in 2026-06-22 staff sample)

fields.divergence: Stencil derives title from 't' / peopleFirstName+peopleLastName metadata; handler uses result.title. Divergence is BENIGN for people: live result.title is the full breadcrumb ('Christopher Smith, EdD | Profiles | ...'); cleanTitle splits on first '|' -> 'Christopher Smith, EdD', matching listMetadata.t[4/5]. No peopleFirstName/peopleLastName keys exist in the live data.

fields.note: Not present on every result (e.g. faculty ranks 3,7-10 omit it); null-guarded.
Can be multi-valued (rank 10: ['Faculty ',' Adjunct']); handler takes [0] only.
Present only on a subset (ranks 3,4,7,8,9,10); null-guarded.

CONFIRMED present in 2026-06-22 staff sample (all 10 ranks). image is an array whose [1] is a truncated duplicate of [0]; the handler's [0] is the canonical URL. Mix of real photos and ProfileDefaultPics-* placeholders.

legs.available_but_unmapped_note: These listMetadata keys are present live but not mapped by the handler. peopleEmail/peoplePhone may matter to the rebuild dropdown - an FE-binding question, flagged not decided.
legs.null_guard: Each metadata field uses listMetadata.<key>?.[0] ? clean(...) : null.

legs.emitted_shape: { metadata: {...}, programs: [...] }  (object wrapper; never a bare array)

fields.note: DEAD FIELD: resultsSummary has NO queryTime key in either live sample. Timing lives at resultPacket.padreElapsedTime / phlusterElapsedTime instead. This field always resolves to its || 0 fallback. Rebuild should drop it or read padreElapsedTime.

fields.divergence: result.title can be LESS complete than listMetadata.t for programs. Rank 10 title='Kinesiology | Seattle University' -> cleanProgramTitle -> 'Kinesiology', dropping the ', MS' that t[4]='Kinesiology, MS' carries. If the dropdown needs the credential in the title, prefer listMetadata.t[4] over result.title for programs.

fields.note: e.g. 'Doctor of Nursing Practice', 'Bachelor of Science', 'Master of Business Administration'. Full credential name.
e.g. 'College of Nursing & Health Sciences', 'Albers School of Business & Economics'.
Free-text, not numeric (e.g. 'Prelicensure: 67 Credits; Total: 163-177', '120 semester/180 quarter credits').
Can be multi-valued (rank 8: 4 areas); handler takes [0] only.

SEMANTIC MISLABEL: 'category' holds career-outcome roles ('Acute Care Nurse Practitioner', 'Vascular Sonographer'), NOT an academic level. The actual academic level lives in the UNMAPPED 'type' key ('Doctorate'/'Major'/"Master's"/'Professional'). If the dropdown wants level, map 'type'; if it wants careers, rename this field. Also multi-valued; handler takes [0].

NON-DISCRIMINATING: every program in the sample carries the SAME generic placeholder (Seattle-University-Fountain-mw.jpg). [1] is a duplicate of [0]. Rebuild may omit image for programs since it conveys nothing.
'c' is the page meta-description/summary. Array [0] is the full sentence, [1] a truncated fragment; handler's [0] is correct. May contain unicode (smart apostrophes).

legs.available_but_unmapped_note: 'type' (academic level: Doctorate/Major/Master's/Professional) is the most useful unmapped key - see details.level mislabel. The programs collection also carries a large block of Fun* accessibility-auditor metadata, irrelevant to the dropdown.
legs.collection_profile_note: The programs collection profile has NO facets (type 'web', empty facetDefinitions), unlike sp-search which is a 'meta' collection with a full facet set.

programs_shape_pin.recommendation: Pin a bare array of program objects for the rebuild dispatcher.
programs_shape_pin.reason: Proxy always emits { metadata, programs } (suggestPrograms.js:486 live, :331 cache); it never emits a bare array, so the FE Array.isArray branch (search-page-autocomplete.js:360-363) is defensive residue with no proxy source. The dropdown consumes title/url/description/details.school; metadata.totalResults is the only live metadata field with content (queryTime is dead). The array is simpler and the FE already tolerates both.
programs_shape_pin.caveat: Confirm metadata is not consumed by the dropdown vs fe-autocomplete-audit-2026-05-05 sections 3/6 before finalizing. If totalResults is needed, carry it as a sibling, not a wrapper.

recommendations.general_shape_pin: Emit { display }; drop metadata.tabs unless the dropdown consumes it (tabs has no Funnelback source).
recommendations.image_field: People: KEEP - confirmed populated and discriminating (real photos / branded placeholders), use [0]. Programs: CONSIDER OMITTING - confirmed present but every program shares the same generic fountain placeholder, so it conveys nothing.
recommendations.programs_level_field: details.level maps from 'category' (career roles), which is mislabeled. Decide per dropdown need: map listMetadata.type for academic level, OR rename the field to reflect that it carries careers. Currently it is neither cleanly.
recommendations.programs_querytime_field: metadata.queryTime is dead (source key absent in live data). Drop it or repoint to resultPacket.padreElapsedTime.
recommendations.programs_title_source: If the dropdown needs the credential suffix (', MS', ', DNP') reliably, prefer listMetadata.t[4] over result.title for programs - result.title occasionally omits it (rank 10).
recommendations.people_extra_fields: Consider whether the rebuild dropdown wants peopleEmail / peoplePhone - present live but dropped by the legacy handler. Decide against fe-autocomplete-audit-2026-05-05.

observations: image present on all 10 ranks; [1] is a truncated duplicate of [0].
No peopleFirstName/peopleLastName keys; name lives in result.title and listMetadata.t.
Unmapped-but-present: peopleEmail, peoplePhone, pronouns, author, type, t.
college and peopleDepartment are sparse (subset of results); affiliation can be multi-valued.
resultsSummary has no queryTime key (padreElapsedTime is at resultPacket level).
programCredentialType, provider, credits, areaOfStudy, category, programMode, image, c all present and mapped.
details.level <- category is a career-role list, not an academic level; 'type' (Doctorate/Major/Master's/Professional) is the real level and is unmapped.
image is the same generic Seattle-University-Fountain-mw.jpg for every program; non-discriminating.
c[0] is the full meta-description, c[1] a truncated fragment; handler uses [0].
result.title sometimes omits the credential (rank 10 'Kinesiology | Seattle University') that listMetadata.t carries ('Kinesiology, MS').
resultsSummary has NO queryTime key -> metadata.queryTime always 0.
Programs collection profile has no facets (type 'web'); large Fun* accessibility-audit metadata block present but irrelevant.

live_confirmation_needed.note: NONE outstanding. Both /s/search.json legs confirmed against 2026-06-22 live samples. The general /s/suggest.json leg returns a plain string array (well understood) and was not separately sampled.

triangulation_sources: fe-autocomplete-audit-2026-05-05 sections 3/6 - output bucket field names
results.people.ftl stencil - people metadata vocabulary (peoplePosition, peopleDepartment, affiliation, college, expertiseArea, t, peopleFirstName/peopleLastName, liveUrl)
funnelback-endpoint-dictionary-2026-05-01 - suggest / suggest-people / suggest-programs transform summaries
live /s/search.json staff sample (query=smith, 2026-06-22) - people-leg field confirmation
live /s/search.json programs sample (query=nursing, 2026-06-22) - programs-leg field confirmation

rebuild_resolutions.note: Additive 2026-06-22. Records the rebuild decisions made against this reference's recommendations, so the canonical reference does not carry superseded recommendations as if open. The reference's 'recommendations' block is preserved as the as-captured input; these are the resolutions.
rebuild_resolutions.bucket_scope: LEAN. The suggestions buckets carry display fields only. The full facet substrate (programs details.*, native facets block, full per-result listMetadata) is reserved for the deferred results-dispatch / ADR-006 path, where faceting actually happens (ds-programs has no facets; program faceting is on the sp-search Programs-tab results path). Preserving the facet substrate != putting it in the suggestions dropdown bucket.
rebuild_resolutions.people_bucket: title, url, image, position, department, affiliation, college. Multi-value metadata (position/department/affiliation/college) preserved as ARRAYS, not [0]-flattened (affiliation is confirmed multi-value); render surface flattens for display. image is scalar [0] (array [1] is a truncation artifact).
rebuild_resolutions.programs_bucket: BARE ARRAY of { title, url, description, school, image }. No metadata wrapper; no details.* (results-path); no id (rank is a per-response ordinal, use url as the key).
rebuild_resolutions.general_bucket: array of { display }. tabs dropped (request-derived, no Funnelback source, no consumer).
rebuild_resolutions.image_decision: KEEP for BOTH people and programs. Overrides this reference's 'CONSIDER OMITTING for programs' recommendation. Reason: programs image has a real source (listMetadata.image); a sibling collection (Cornish) already uses custom per-program images, so per-program images are an existing institutional pattern, not hypothetical, and would flow through the same mapping with no dispatcher change. The current generic-placeholder value is a content/crawler state, not a reason to drop the field.
rebuild_resolutions.people_contact_fields_decision: DEPRECATE peopleEmail, peoplePhone, pronouns. Overrides this reference's 'consider whether the dropdown wants them' recommendation. Reason: they serve neither display nor faceting (genuinely deprecatable, unlike the multi-value facet fields). Source data remains; re-adding is a one-line mapping change if a future people-card surface needs contact details.
rebuild_resolutions.programs_level_credential_category_remap: CORRECTED MAPPING (for the deferred results-dispatch brief, not the lean suggestions bucket): details.level <- listMetadata.type (academic level: Doctorate/Major/Master's/Professional); details.credential <- listMetadata.programCredentialType (full credential, e.g. 'Doctor of Nursing Practice') -- RENAMED from details.type to avoid colliding with the input key 'type' now feeding level; careers <- listMetadata.category (career-outcome roles, preserved as an array). The page source confirms these are three distinct authored properties (programType / educationalCredentialAwarded / occupationalCategory), not an indexing artifact.
rebuild_resolutions.title_sources: people title <- result.title (HTML-strip + first-pipe-split + trim). programs title <- the credential-bearing clean title in listMetadata.t (result.title drops the credential on some records); strip + trim, no pipe-split.
rebuild_resolutions.normalization_refinement: First-pipe-split applies ONLY to the title (a breadcrumb concern). Metadata display fields get HTML-strip + trim per element, never pipe-split (which would truncate any value containing a '|').
rebuild_resolutions.crawler_assumption: Builds assume the CURRENT indexed crawler output. Crawler changes (e.g. indexing the EducationalOccupationalProgram microdata `image` instead of `og:image` for per-program images) are a separate later lever the developer owns; the dispatcher reads listMetadata fields identically either way, so no build couples to a not-yet-made crawler change.

deferred_coverage.note: Additive 2026-06-22. Collections / fileTypes NOT sampled or mapped here, with their home and the queries to run when taken up.
deferred_coverage.scope_boundary: This reference covers the three SUGGESTIONS legs (general, people, programs). News, Law, and PDFs are not suggestion legs and were deliberately not sampled.
deferred_coverage.news: Routed from the general bucket as a render-surface display concern (ADR-007), not a suggestion leg. Its result/facet shape belongs to the results / tab-content path. Sample when taken up: /s/search.json collection=seattleu~sp-search with f.Tabs|seattleu~ds-news=News.
deferred_coverage.law: A results tab (seattleu~ds-law), not a suggestion leg. Belongs to the results / tab-content path. Sample when taken up: the law tab via f.Tabs|seattleu~ds-law (or the law collection directly).
deferred_coverage.pdf: A fileType that can appear within any collection's results, not a tab or leg. The check is mapping robustness when result.fileType is 'pdf' rather than 'html' (title/summary source may differ; no page-title breadcrumb structure). Belongs to the results path.
deferred_coverage.results_path_binding_inputs: When the results-dispatch / ADR-006 brief is taken up, its binding inputs are the native facets block (populated on the sp-search _default profile; empty on ds-programs) and the full per-result listMetadata, plus News/Law/PDF samples.
deferred_coverage.general_leg_shape_unconfirmed: The general leg's /s/suggest.json response shape was never live-sampled (people and programs were). The dispatcher assumes a top-level JSON array and fails safe to [] otherwise. Confirm with one live sample (/s/suggest.json?collection=seattleu~sp-search&profile=_default&partial_query=nurs) before the general bucket is trusted in production -- naturally folded into the resilience brief.

seal.note: Sealed canonical record. The rebuild_resolutions and deferred_coverage blocks (authored 2026-06-22) are additive; the original recommendations / status / live_confirmation_needed blocks are preserved as the as-captured input. This sealed reference supersedes the in-chat suggestions-mapping addenda from 2026-06-22 and is the input to the future results-dispatch / ADR-006 brief.
